description: Volatility risk premium engine - implied vol minus realized vol. Daily computes equity-index VRP at 9d/30d/3m tenors, its percentile and z-score, the ex-post realized premium, and a RICH/NORMAL/THIN/INVERTED regime. data/vrp.json.

eventbridge_scheduler.description: Volatility risk premium engine - daily 22:30 UTC via Amazon EventBridge Scheduler, after the US cash close so it scores against the settled VIX and SPY closes.
